steps.title: Use the beach action
steps.content: Gogol is at the beach, where he collects rocks and digs tunnels in the sand. In this setting, "collects" means he picks up or gathers rocks.

steps.title: Reject wrong senses
steps.content:
• Choice A means makes greater in amount, which does not fit rocks on a beach.
  • Choice B means creates, but Gogol does not make the rocks.
  • Choice C means pays no attention to, the opposite of collecting.
The remaining choice means gathers. The answer is D.
